shipCards.description: Just a standard ship. Nuff said.

cards.description: She may move at a snail’s pace but she has a big heart that shoots a very short range and very powerful electrical blast. Don’t get her attention because her high health means she doesn’t give up easily.

skins.description: And just like that - obstacles magically vanish!

cards.description: He moves slowly because his arms weigh a thousand pounds but it feels like a lot more when he’s clubbing you and your friends. Watch out when his arms spin they deal area damage to everything in range.
The F doesn’t stand for friendly.
A dangerous all-rounder. She has a gun and probably knows how to use it but no one has dared to ask her.
Stunning in more ways than one
This shy little robot likes to hide behind its friends. Don’t let it hide for too long because it has perfect aim from long range.
A strong minded robot with moral ambiguity on its side and a sword it wields with devastating precision. Don’t let it get too close because each strike deals massive damage.

Only cares about one thing: destroying buildings. Don’t expect a grin from this reckless, tough-skinned amphibian - except when he’s flying at your base on his hover-bike ready to turn it into rubble.
He may not deal a lot of damage but his scatter gun shoots fast and he runs even faster. What’s his secret? He eats a bowl of spinach everyday.

skins.description: Gather all 6 aspects and unlock the ultimate form!

cards.description: These three robots may look small and weak but they’ll become your worst nightmare if they surround you when you’re all alone.
These ten robots may look small and weak but they’ll become your worst nightmare if they surround you when you’re all alone.
